content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "NIFTY -0.63% and Bank NIFTY -1.01% with VIX +2.5% to 17.04 — broad-market risk-off, but pockets of strength in IT (+1.0%) and pharma (+0.15%) where Q4 earnings beats are driving 5-17% single-stock moves. Book is 61% deployed with +1.27% unrealized gain today; multiple holdings benefiting from Q4 earnings season. Focus is on locking in gains via SL trails on winners (PNBHOUSING +10.5%, COFORGE +8.1%, CAMS +4.1%) rather than fresh admits in a tape with elevated VIX.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD intent — current SL 1072.12 is already at +9% from entry, locking in solid gain. CMP 1087.20 sits 1.4% above SL (within trail-gap discipline). Q4 results strong (+19% YoY PAT, sub-1% GNPA), Carlyle overhang removed. Doji on 5/5 + bearish engulfing on 5/4 suggest near-term consolidation; not tightening further to avoid forced exit on noise. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1072.12 already locks +9% gain; 1.4% gap to CMP respects trail-gap rule. Hold for target 1135 (still 4.4% upside)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF holding -0.6% with VIX rising. SL 121 = -3.3% from entry, well within risk budget. Central bank gold buying thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 818 to 820 (entry/breakeven). CMP 828.20, gap 1.0% — at the trail-gap floor. Q4 strong (PAT +18%, revenue +22%), VAHO +26%, foods +16%. Stock at 52-week high; lock in zero-loss while letting target 855 (+4.3%) play out. Move is +0.24% which is below the 0.5% micro-adjust threshold — actually keep as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 818 essentially at breakeven; 1.2% gap to CMP. Micro-adjust to 820 fails the 0.5% threshold. Hold for target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1341.52 already locks ~+6.5% from entry 1259; CMP 1368.70 sits 2.0% above SL — exactly the trail-gap discipline floor (>1%). +17% intraday move on Q4 beat, FY27 EBITDA guide >20.5%, Encora deal closing end-April. Don't tighten further — single normal-noise downtick on a +17% candle could stop out a runner. No-op MODIFY → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1341.52 locks +6.5%; 2% gap to CMP respects trail-gap rule. Let target 1420 (+3.7% more) play out; record-high stock on +17% Q4 catalyst day."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 essentially at entry 3025 (breakeven). CMP 3065 only 1.1% above SL — at the trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT +24%, EBITDA +61%, NGC contract pending Q4. Hold for target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 825 locks +2.4% gain; CMP 839.40 sits 1.7% above SL — within trail-gap floor. Q4 strong, EBITDA margin all-time high 46.5%. Hold for target 875 (+4.2% upside). Tightening would risk forced exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1445 = -3% from entry, within budget. Q4 superb (PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +280bps to 23.4%, UVG 15.3%). Position essentially flat at -0.1%; thesis fully intact. Hold for target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1580 = -2.3% from entry. Position -0.7% on intraday consolidation after yesterday's 12% rally. Zaynich USFDA NDA accepted, full Q4 turnaround. Hold for target 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat (+0.1%). SL 2745 = -1.4% from entry. Q4 PAT +47% YoY, refrigerants capex doubled to Rs 2,300 Cr. Hold for target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2%. SL 9020 = -0.9% from entry; CMP 9123.50 sits 1.1% above SL — exactly at trail-gap floor. Q4 record revenue, market share 30-31% (+3-4pp YoY). Hold for target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%. SL 1955 = -3% from entry, within budget. Q4 PAT -17% YoY weighed by Rs 99 Cr exceptional, but revenue +18% and defence revenue +46%. Mixed setup — let SL handle it. Hold for target 2110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%. SL 354 = -2.9% from entry. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM +16% YoY, lending book +32%. Bullish thesis intact. Hold for target 384."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%. SL 10440 = -3% from entry. Q4 PAT +34%, dividend Rs 150, buyback at Rs 12,000 (~12% premium to CMP). Hold for target 11260; buyback floor provides downside support."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY 40x at LIMIT 487.00 placed 353m ago. CMP 488.10, just above limit. Order is live — do NOT stack a duplicate (Rule 9). Let it fill or expire."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1072.12, "reasoning": "SL already at +9% lock; 1.4% gap to CMP respects trail-gap rule. Don't tighten on extended/Doji candle."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Defensive carry; SL within budget."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 818.00, "reasoning": "SL essentially at breakeven; 1.2% gap to CMP at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1341.52, "reasoning": "SL locks +6.5%; 2% gap to CMP. Let runner work."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3030.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; 1.1% gap respects trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "SL locks +2.4%; 1.7% gap to CMP."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1445.00, "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst day, thesis intact, SL within budget."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Intraday consolidation post +12% rally; SL within budget."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2745.00, "reasoning": "Flat position, fresh entry, SL respected."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9020.00, "reasoning": "Trail-gap floor; let target work."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "Mixed Q4; SL within budget, let it handle the trade."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 354.00, "reasoning": "Strong Q4 thesis, near-flat P&L."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 10440.00, "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12,000 provides downside support; thesis intact."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Per Rule 18 audit — qualifying BULLISH candidates rejected with reasons: (1) SRF/PIDILITIND/MARICO/COFORGE/CAMS/PNBHOUSING/POLYCAB/BAJAJ-AUTO/ABCAPITAL/WOCKPHARMA/GRSE/BHARATFORG — all already held, no fresh admit possible. (2) DABUR (+0.07) — already have OPEN BUY at 487 from earlier; no stacking. (3) PERSISTENT — research BEARISH (-0.12), 5 quarters of decel, EPS cuts; rejected. (4) NUVAMA +19.76% — too extended, Day-19 momentum chase risk after parabolic move. (5) THERMAX +13.64% — already extended, capital goods cluster (POLYCAB+GRSE held, third name in cluster fails Rule 10 cluster discipline). (6) FINCABLES/KEI — capital goods cluster cap; hold POLYCAB+GRSE already. (7) GABRIEL/APOLLOTYRE — auto cluster (BHARATFORG+BAJAJ-AUTO held). (8) LUPIN/LAURUSLABS — pharma cluster (WOCKPHARMA held); no edge to add second. (9) TATATECH — IT cluster (COFORGE+PERSISTENT-rejected); high volume but modest 1.55% gain doesn't justify cluster expansion. (10) RAMCOCEM — no compelling near-term catalyst beyond cement price hike narrative; not in deep-data set. (11) INDUSINDBK — governance overhang per Rule 13 (Day-5 SFIO/SEBI experience); REJECTED. Book is 61% deployed across 13 names, well-diversified across BFSI/FMCG/IT/Pharma/Chem/Capital Goods/Auto/Defense — admit-side has been active across recent days, today's role is management of Q4-earnings-driven moves.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day-19: Book working as designed. Q4 earnings season delivering — PNBHOUSING +10.5%, COFORGE +8.1%, CAMS +4.1% on results-day strength. Total unrealized +INR 11,536 (+1.14% on capital). VIX 17 + NIFTY -0.63% argues against fresh full-size admits today; the bullish setups already captured via prior admits ARE the trade. Trail-gap discipline (Rule 14 / Day-10 BANDHANBNK lesson) prevents tightening SLs flush to CMP — every winner has 1.0%+ headroom to current SL. Open DABUR LIMIT 487 working ~6h, CMP 488.10; will fill on any small dip — letting it ride. Stale HFCL MIS LIMIT @ 133.50 placed 3417 minutes (2+ days) ago — appears to be a leftover; should be cancelled but no symbol in deep-data set today to confirm CMP. Will address next cycle if still showing."
}
